title: frankenia ericifolia subsp. latifolia
intro: Frankenia ericifolia subsp. latifolia, also known as sea heath, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Frankeniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Frankenia ericifolia subsp. latifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine.
